sections.content:
Now I see the bottom area more clearly:
- Rows 38-42: red path area
- Row 38: WWWBRRRRRB... - red path at cols 14-19 (RRRRR)
- Row 39: WWWBBRRRRB... - red path at cols 16-19 (RRRR)
- Row 40: WWWBRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRB... - red path at cols 14-41 (long horizontal line)
- Row 41: WWWBBRRRRB... - red path at cols 16-19 (RRRR)
- Row 42: WWWBRRRRRB... - red path at cols 14-19 (RRRRR)
- Row 49: WWWBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBbbbbbbb - target at cols 43-49 (bbbbbbb)
So the red path forms a "C" shape:
- Left vertical: rows 38-42, cols 14-19
- Bottom horizontal: row 40, cols 14-41
- Right vertical: rows 9-41, col 40
The target is at row 49, cols 43-49 (bbbbbbb).
Now I understand the maze structure:
- Top corridor: rows 8-12, cols 14-42 (player moves RIGHT/LEFT)
- Left corridor: rows 14-36, cols 14-18 (player moves DOWN/UP from top-left)
- Bottom corridor: rows 38-42, cols 14-42 (red path)
- Right corridor: rows 14-36, cols 38-42 (player moves DOWN/UP from top-right)
- Target: rows 49-55, cols 43-49 (bbbbbbb)
The player starts at the top-left position (rows 8-12, cols 14-18). The player can:
1. Move RIGHT along the top corridor to the top-right position.
2. Move DOWN from the top-left position to the left corridor.
3. From the left corridor, move DOWN to the bottom-left position.
4. From the bottom-left position, move RIGHT along the bottom corridor to the bottom-right position.
5. From the bottom-right position, move DOWN to the target.
But the player can't move RIGHT from the bottom-left position (as I observed earlier). Let me check why.
Actually, looking at the ascii, the bottom area has:
- Row 38: WWWBRRRRRB... - red path at cols 14-19
- Row 42: WWWBRRRRRB... - red path at cols 14-19
- Row 43: WWWBBBBBBB... - wall at cols 14-19
So the bottom-left position is rows 38-42, cols 14-19. The player can move RIGHT from this position along the bottom corridor.
Wait, but earlier I observed that the player can't move RIGHT from the bottom-left position. Let me re-examine.
Actually, I think the player was at a different position earlier. Let me check the history to see where the player was before trying to move RIGHT.
Let me try moving DOWN from the current position (top-left) to the left corridor, then continue DOWN to the bottom-left position, then move RIGHT along the bottom corridor.
But first, let me check if the player can move DOWN from the current position (top-left, rows 8-12, cols 14-18).
